title: Tree Feature
description:

• mega_trunk ({ branches, trunk_decoration, trunk_width, ... })

• canopy ({ canopy_decoration, canopy_offset, min_width, ... })
• mangrove_canopy
• ... and 17 more properties

acacia_trunk.title: Acacia Trunk
acacia_trunk.description:
Properties:

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description: The name of this feature in the form 'namespace_name:feature_name'. 'feature_name' must match the filename.
